title: scabiosa columbaria subsp. pratensis
intro: Scabiosa columbaria subsp. pratensis, also known as the Field Scabious, is a perennial herb belonging to the honeysuckle family (Caprifoliaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral effects. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, soothing respiratory issues, and promoting wound healing. The herbal preparations of Field Scabious include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
